text:
The booting process  stops at the line mounting root ufs /dev/md0 (Starting with the option for no acpi )

Can't boot or install the freebsd 7.0 or the pcbsd 
I have Amd athlon 64x2 2.6 , 3gb ram  , sapphire motherboard and one sata and one ide hard disk, Nvidia graphics card.
